title: Garden Route Dam level update
description: GEORGE NEWS - The latest water update,...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The latest water update, supplied by George Municipality on Wednesday 25 September:

- Dam level: 86,27%
- Rainfall: 76 mm (Measured rainfall figures from 17 - 23 September)

For water-saving tips please visit here.

The cooperation of all users of municipal water is essential and is greatly appreciated.

Interesting facts about water from the US Environmental Protection Agency:

- How much water must a person consume per day to maintain health?2.37 litres from all sources (i.e. water, food)
- How much of the human body is water?66%
- How much of the earth’s water is suitable for drinking water?1%
- Is it possible for me to drink water that was part of the dinosaur era?Yes - water is constantly recycled
- Where was the first municipal water filtration works opened and when?Paisley, Scotland in 1832

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
